title: Moderation Update – April 29, 2026
body: The moderation queue has been processed. Actions taken: 2 bans (spam/phishing and targeted harassment), 2 warnings (off-topic posting and suspicious automation), and 2 reports closed with no action (false positives involving trusted community members). We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you believe an action was taken in error, please reach out to the mod team.
